Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows anemia (low hemoglobin), leukopenia, elevated hematocrit, impaired renal function (high creatinine), hyperbilirubinemia, low serum protein, metabolic acidosis (low pH), and hypoglycemia. Coagulation abnormalities (prolonged aPTT, low PT/INR), mild hypoxemia, and abnormal urinalysis (glucosuria, proteinuria, nitrites, ketones, low specific gravity) are present. Findings suggest possible chronic kidney and liver dysfunction, metabolic derangement, and risk of infection. Clinical correlation and further evaluation are strongly recommended.
